methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: Custodied ERC-721 NFTs (MunchNFT) held by LandManager while staked (via transferFrom into this contract)
Accrued in-protocol rewards accounting: 'unfedSchnibbles' credited to renter and landlord players (value-bearing if later redeemable elsewhere)
state_assets: Tax configuration state: MIN_TAX_RATE, MAX_TAX_RATE, DEFAULT_TAX_RATE
Reward configuration state: BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE, REALM_BONUSES[], RARITY_BONUSES[]
NFT custody provenance: munchableOwner[tokenId] => original owner/mainAccount
Per-NFT staking/reward state: toilerState[tokenId] => {lastToilDate, plotId, landlord, latestTaxRate, dirty}
Configured dependency addresses: lockManager, accountManager, munchNFT, nftAttributesManager
Config pointer inherited from BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable: configStorage (and any inherited pause/config state)
privilege_assets: Config authority: onlyConfigStorage-gated ability to trigger LandManager reconfiguration (configUpdated -> _reconfigure)
Pause authority (inherited): notPaused modifier gates key user entrypoints; whoever can pause/unpause can freeze staking/unstaking/farming/tax updates
Upgradeable initialization authority: initialize() is public and protected by initializer (single-use); deployment/initialization sequencing is a privileged control point
reputation_assets: Player reward reputation/accounting: correctness of schnibbles accrual to landlord vs renter (unfedSchnibbles balances and lastPetMunchable timestamp)
Landlord tax-rate fairness and boundedness (MIN/MAX) affecting user trust
Plot occupancy integrity (who is staking where) as a core game/protocol integrity asset

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: LandManager inherits BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable and implements ILandManager. BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable is assumed to provide: configStorage reference, notPaused modifier, onlyConfigStorage modifier, onlyConfiguredContract(key) modifier, and reconfigure hook (__BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable_reconfigure). LandManager relies on external manager contracts for player state and locked-value derived plot counts.
external_dependencies: Upgradeable base pattern components via BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable (likely OZ Initializable/Pausable-style patterns, exact bases not shown)
IConfigStorage (getAddress, getUint, getSmallIntArray, getSmallUintArray) via BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable/configStorage
MunchablesCommonLib types: Player, NFTImmutableAttributes (via IAccountManager/INFTAttributesManager return types)
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: Upgradeable implementation-style contract (constructor disables initializers; public initialize() with initializer modifier). No proxy contract shown here, but the pattern strongly implies intended deployment behind a proxy (UUPS/Transparent/Beacon unknown from provided code). No Diamond pattern detected in provided file.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Role/authority is primarily externalized to ConfigStorage: (1) onlyConfigStorage for configUpdated; (2) onlyConfiguredContract(StorageKey.AccountManager) for updatePlotMetadata; (3) notPaused gating for most user actions. User-level authorization uses accountManager.getPlayer() to map caller to mainAccount and checks munchableOwner[tokenId] == mainAccount for stake ownership control. Landlord identity is also resolved through accountManager registration checks.

state_changes: Inherited: BaseBlastManagerUpgradeable.initialize(_configStorage) likely sets configStorage and base state
Within forceFarmPlots: toilerState[*].lastToilDate/latestTaxRate/dirty may change; accountManager player states may update
Within forceFarmPlots: toilerState[*].lastToilDate/latestTaxRate/dirty may change; accountManager player states may update
Within forceFarmPlots: toilerState[*].lastToilDate/latestTaxRate/dirty may change; accountManager player states may update
toilerState[tokenId].lastToilDate (for each staked token, unless dirty)
toilerState[tokenId].latestTaxRate (for each staked token, unless dirty)
External state via accountManager.updatePlayer: renterMetadata.unfedSchnibbles; landlordMetadata.unfedSchnibbles; landlordMetadata.lastPetMunchable

upgradeability_surface.notes: Constructor calls _disableInitializers() and initialize() uses initializer, indicating intended proxy deployment. However, no proxy/UUPS/Transparent/Beacon contract code was provided, so pattern cannot be confirmed from this snippet alone.
